_comment: TEMPLATE — copy this to characters/<id>.json and fill in. Remove all _comment fields. After creating, add an entry to characters/index.json.

species._comment: Species key (lowercase). Variant for Human: 'standard' (PHB24, +1 to two abilities) or 'classic' (PHB14, +1 all).

background._comment: Background key (e.g. 'scribe'). abilityIncreases distributes the +2 / +1 (or three +1s) from PHB24 backgrounds.

classes._comment: Add additional class objects to this array for multiclassing. The FIRST class grants save proficiencies.

abilityScores._comment: base = the 6 starting scores you assigned. species/background/feat bonuses are added on top. magicOverrides = items like Amulet of Health that SET (not add) a score.

hp._comment: maxBase = computed from class HP rules. maxOverride = null normally; set a number to force a value (DM tool).
